current_run.problem_name: Hidden Twisted Adjacent Bit Pair Sum Parity
current_run.description: Given an oracle that computes the parity of the sum of twisted adjacent bit pairs of a secret number, find the secret number. The function is f(x) = ( (x_0 + x_1 + C) % 2 ) ^ ( (x_1 + x_2 + C) % 2 ) ^ ... ^ ( (x_{N-2} + x_{N-1} + C) % 2 ) where C is a secret constant and x_i are bits of x. The parity is taken over all such adjacent pairs.
